MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s.id, s.name LIMIT 10
MATCH (p:Platform) WHERE p.capacity > 50 RETURN p.id, p.name ORDER BY p.capacity DESC
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'Operational' RETURN t.id, t.model
MATCH (d:Depot) WHERE d.location = 'Stockholm' RETURN d.id, d.name
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.departureTime > datetime('2026-03-20T00:00:00') RETURN j.id, j.departureTime ORDER BY j.departureTime
MATCH (t:Ticket)<-[p:PURCHASED]-(pa:Passenger) WHERE pa.name = 'Anna Svensson' RETURN t.id, t.type, p.purchaseTime
MATCH (r:Route)-[:AFFECTED]->(i:Incident) WHERE i.severity = 'High' RETURN r.id, r.name, i.description
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(p:Passenger) WHERE tc.expiryDate < date('2026-04-01') RETURN tc.id, tc.type
MATCH (pa:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.type = 'Monthly' RETURN pa.name AS passenger, COUNT(t) AS monthly_tickets ORDER BY monthly_tickets DESC
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) WHERE tr.model = 'X2000' WITH s, COUNT(tr) AS train_count WHERE train_count > 5 RETURN s.name, train_count
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(s:Station) WHERE s.name = 'Gothenburg' RETURN r.name AS route, COUNT(s) AS stations_count
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.date = date('2026-03-24') RETURN dpl.stationId, dpl.passengerCount ORDER BY dpl.passengerCount DESC
MATCH (t:Train {status: 'Under Maintenance'}) SET t.status = 'Operational' RETURN t.id, t.status
MATCH (i:Incident {status: 'Open'}) WHERE i.timestamp < datetime('2026-03-20T00:00:00') SET i.status = 'Closed' RETURN i.id, i.status
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE ts.month = 'March' DELETE ts
MATCH (pa:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.type IN ['Single', 'Return'] WITH pa, COUNT(t) AS ticket_count WHERE ticket_count > 3 RETURN pa.name, ticket_count ORDER BY ticket_count DESC
MATCH (r:Route)-[:AFFECTED]->(i:Incident {severity: 'High'}) WITH r, COUNT(i) AS incident_count WHERE incident_count > 2 RETURN r.name, incident_count ORDER BY incident_count DESC

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) WHERE tr.model = 'X2000' WITH s, COUNT(tr) AS train_count WHERE train_count > 5 MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr2:Train {model: 'X2000'}) RETURN s.name, train_count, AVG(tr2.speed) AS avg_speed
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.timestamp > datetime('2026-02-01T00:00:00') RETURN m.trainId, m.description, m.timestamp ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.timestamp > datetime('2026-02-01T00:00:00') RETURN sm.name, COUNT(m) AS maintenance_tasks ORDER BY maintenance_tasks DESC
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.departureTime >= datetime('2026-03-20T00:00:00') AND j.departureTime < datetime('2026-03-25T00:00:00') RETURN j.id, j.departureTime, j.arrivalTime
MATCH (t:Ticket)<-[p:PURCHASED]-(pa:Passenger) WHERE pa.name CONTAINS 'Svensson' RETURN t.id, t.type, p.purchaseTime, pa.name
MATCH (r:Route)-[:AFFECTED]->(i:Incident) WHERE i.severity IN ['High', 'Medium'] RETURN r.id, r.name, i.description, i.severity
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(p:Passenger) WHERE tc.expiryDate >= date('2026-03-01') AND tc.expiryDate <= date('2026-06-01') RETURN tc.id, tc.type, tc.expiryDate
MATCH (pa:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.type = 'Return' RETURN pa.name AS passenger, COUNT(t) AS return_tickets ORDER BY return_tickets DESC
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) WHERE tr.model CONTAINS '200' WITH s, COUNT(tr) AS train_count RETURN s.name, train_count ORDER BY train_count DESC
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(s:Station) WITH r, COUNT(s) AS station_count WHERE station_count > 10 RETURN r.name AS route, station_count ORDER BY station_count DESC
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.date >= date('2026-03-20') AND dpl.date <= date('2026-03-24') RETURN dpl.stationId, dpl.passengerCount ORDER BY dpl.passengerCount DESC
MATCH (t:Train {status: 'Delayed'}) SET t.status = 'On Time' RETURN t.id, t.status
MATCH (i:Incident {status: 'Open'}) WHERE i.severity = 'Low' DELETE i
MATCH (sm:StaffMember {role: 'Conductor'}) SET sm.role = 'Senior Conductor' RETURN sm.name, sm.role

MATCH (pa:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.type IN ['Single', 'Return', 'Monthly'] WITH pa, COUNT(t) AS ticket_count, COLLECT(DISTINCT t.type) AS ticket_types WHERE ticket_count > 2 AND SIZE(ticket_types) > 1 RETURN pa.name, ticket_count, ticket_types ORDER BY ticket_count DESC

MATCH (r:Route)-[:AFFECTED]->(i:Incident) WHERE i.severity = 'High' WITH r, COUNT(i) AS incident_count, SUM(CASE WHEN i.status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open_incidents WHERE incident_count > 1 RETURN r.name, incident_count, open_incidents ORDER BY incident_count DESC

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) WHERE tr.model STARTS WITH 'X' WITH s, COUNT(tr) AS train_count MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr2:Train) RETURN s.name, train_count, AVG(tr2.speed) AS avg_speed ORDER BY train_count DESC

MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.timestamp > datetime('2026-01-01T00:00:00') AND m.timestamp < datetime('2026-04-01T00:00:00') RETURN m.trainId, m.description, m.timestamp, m.status ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(:Ticket {type: 'Monthly'}) } RETURN p.name
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE SIZE([(r)-[:INCLUDES]->(st:Station) | st.name]) > 15 RETURN r.name
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.model IN ['X2000', 'X1000'] CALL { WITH t MATCH (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN COUNT(s) AS station_count } RETURN t.id, t.model, station_count ORDER BY station_count DESC
MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) RETURN s.name, COUNT(tr) AS train_count, AVG(tr.speed) AS avg_speed ORDER BY train_count DESC

MATCH (pa:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.type = 'Single' RETURN pa.name, COUNT(t) AS single_tickets, SUM(CASE WHEN t.price > 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expensive_tickets ORDER BY single_tickets DESC
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(s:Station) WITH r, COLLECT(s.name) AS stations WHERE SIZE(stations) > 10 RETURN r.name, stations ORDER BY SIZE(stations) DESC
MATCH (t:Train) OPTIONAL MATCH (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH t, COUNT(s) AS station_count WHERE station_count > 5 RETURN t.id, t.model, station_count ORDER BY station_count DESC
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.name =~ '.*burg$' RETURN s.id, s.name
MATCH (pa:Passenger) WHERE pa.name =~ '(?i).*svensson.*' RETURN pa.name
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE ANY(s IN [(r)-[:INCLUDES]->(st:Station) | st.name] WHERE s CONTAINS 'central') RETURN r.name
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE duration.between(j.departureTime, j.arrivalTime).hours > 2 RETURN j.id, j.departureTime, j.arrivalTime
MATCH path = (s1:Station)-[:STOPS_AT*1..3]->(s2:Station) WHERE s1.name = 'Stockholm' AND s2.name = 'Goteborg' RETURN nodes(path) AS stations, length(path) AS distance
MATCH (s1:Station {name: 'Stockholm'}), (s2:Station {name: 'Malmo'}) MATCH path = shortestPath((s1)-[:STOPS_AT*1..10]->(s2)) RETURN nodes(path) AS stations, length(path) AS distance
MATCH (s1:Station {name: 'Stockholm'}), (s2:Station {name: 'Goteborg'}) MATCH path = allShortestPaths((s1)-[:STOPS_AT*1..10]->(s2)) RETURN nodes(path) AS stations, length(path) AS distance
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'Stockholm' RETURN s.name AS location, 'Station' AS type UNION MATCH (d:Depot) WHERE d.location CONTAINS 'Stockholm' RETURN d.name AS location, 'Depot' AS type
MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[*1..2]-(nearby) WITH s, collect(DISTINCT nearby) AS nodes RETURN s.name, [node IN nodes WHERE node:Platform | node.name] AS platforms
MATCH (t:Train) RETURN t.id, t.model, CASE WHEN t.speed > 200 THEN 'High Speed' WHEN t.speed > 100 THEN 'Medium Speed' ELSE 'Low Speed' END AS speed_category
MATCH (pa:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN DISTINCT pa.name, t.type
MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) RETURN s.name, COLLECT(tr.model) AS train_models
MATCH (tr:Train) OPTIONAL MATCH (tr)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN tr.id, REDUCE(total = 0, station IN COLLECT(s) | total + station.capacity) AS total_capacity
MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) WITH s, COLLECT(tr.model) AS models RETURN s.name, TAIL(models) AS models_except_first
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE 100 <= t.speed <= 250 RETURN t.id, t.model, t.speed
MATCH (pa:Passenger) WITH pa ORDER BY rand() LIMIT 5 RETURN pa.name
MATCH (tr:Train) RETURN percentileDisc(tr.speed, 0.5) AS median_speed
MATCH (tr:Train) RETURN percentileCont(tr.speed, 0.75) AS p75_speed
MATCH (p:Platform) WHERE p.capacity < 50 RETURN p.id, p.name, p.capacity
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'Under Maintenance' RETURN t.id, t.model, t.status
MATCH (d:Depot) WHERE d.location = 'Goteborg' RETURN d.id, d.name
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.arrivalTime < datetime('2026-03-20T23:59:59') RETURN j.id, j.departureTime, j.arrivalTime
MATCH (t:Ticket)<-[p:PURCHASED]-(pa:Passenger) WHERE pa.name = 'Lars Andersson' RETURN t.id, t.type, p.purchaseTime
MATCH (r:Route)-[:AFFECTED]->(i:Incident) WHERE i.severity = 'Critical' RETURN r.id, r.name, i.description
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(p:Passenger) WHERE tc.expiryDate > date('2026-03-20') RETURN tc.id, tc.type, tc.expiryDate
MATCH (pa:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.type = 'Single' RETURN pa.name AS passenger, COUNT(t) AS single_tickets ORDER BY single_tickets DESC
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) WHERE tr.model = 'X1000' WITH s, COUNT(tr) AS train_count RETURN s.name, train_count ORDER BY train_count DESC
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(s:Station) WHERE s.name = 'Uppsala' RETURN r.name AS route, COUNT(s) AS stations_count
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.date = date('2026-03-23') RETURN dpl.stationId, dpl.passengerCount ORDER BY dpl.passengerCount DESC
MATCH (t:Train {status: 'Delayed'}) SET t.status = 'Cancelled' RETURN t.id, t.status
MATCH (i:Incident {status: 'Open'}) WHERE i.timestamp < datetime('2026-03-20T00:00:00') DELETE i
MATCH (sm:StaffMember {role: 'Driver'}) SET sm.role = 'Senior Driver' RETURN sm.name, sm.role
MATCH (pa:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.type = 'Monthly' RETURN pa.name AS passenger, COUNT(t) AS monthly_tickets ORDER BY monthly_tickets DESC
MATCH (r:Route)-[:AFFECTED]->(i:Incident) WHERE i.severity = 'High' WITH r, COUNT(i) AS incident_count RETURN r.name, incident_count ORDER BY incident_count DESC
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) WHERE tr.model = 'X2000' WITH s, count(tr) AS train_count, avg(tr.speed) AS avg_speed RETURN s.name, train_count, avg_speed ORDER BY train_count DESC
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.timestamp > datetime('2026-02-01T00:00:00') RETURN m.trainId, m.description, m.timestamp ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[r:PURCHASED]->(:Ticket {type: 'Return'}) } RETURN p.name
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE SIZE([(r)-[:INCLUDES]->(s:Station) | s.name]) > 12 RETURN r.name
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.model IN ['X2000', 'X1000'] CALL { WITH t MATCH (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN COUNT(s) AS station_count } RETURN t.id, t.model, station_count ORDER BY station_count DESC
MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) RETURN s.name, COUNT(tr) AS train_count, AVG(tr.speed) AS avg_speed ORDER BY train_count DESC

MATCH (pa:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.type = 'Return' RETURN pa.name, COUNT(t) AS return_tickets, SUM(CASE WHEN t.price > 200 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expensive_tickets ORDER BY return_tickets DESC
MATCH (r:Route)-[:INCLUDES]->(s:Station) WITH r, COLLECT(s.name) AS stations WHERE SIZE(stations) > 8 RETURN r.name, stations ORDER BY SIZE(stations) DESC
MATCH (t:Train) OPTIONAL MATCH (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH t, COUNT(s) AS station_count WHERE station_count > 3 RETURN t.id, t.model, station_count ORDER BY station_count DESC
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.name =~ '.*holm$' RETURN s.id, s.name
MATCH (pa:Passenger) WHERE pa.name =~ '(?i).*andersson.*' RETURN pa.name
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE ANY(s IN [(r)-[:INCLUDES]->(st:Station) | st.name] WHERE s CONTAINS 'central') RETURN r.name
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE duration.between(j.departureTime, j.arrivalTime).hours > 3 RETURN j.id, j.departureTime, j.arrivalTime
MATCH path = (s1:Station)-[:STOPS_AT*1..3]->(s2:Station) WHERE s1.name = 'Stockholm' AND s2.name = 'Uppsala' RETURN nodes(path) AS stations, length(path) AS distance
MATCH (s1:Station {name: 'Stockholm'}), (s2:Station {name: 'Malmo'}) MATCH path = shortestPath((s1)-[:STOPS_AT*1..10]->(s2)) RETURN nodes(path) AS stations, length(path) AS distance
MATCH (s1:Station {name: 'Stockholm'}), (s2:Station {name: 'Goteborg'}) MATCH path = allShortestPaths((s1)-[:STOPS_AT*1..10]->(s2)) RETURN nodes(path) AS stations, length(path) AS distance
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'Stockholm' RETURN s.name AS location, 'Station' AS type UNION MATCH (d:Depot) WHERE d.location CONTAINS 'Stockholm' RETURN d.name AS location, 'Depot' AS type
MATCH (t:Train) RETURN t.id, t.model, CASE WHEN t.speed > 200 THEN 'High Speed' WHEN t.speed > 100 THEN 'Medium Speed' ELSE 'Low Speed' END AS speed_category
MATCH (pa:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN DISTINCT pa.name, t.type
MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) RETURN s.name, COLLECT(DISTINCT tr.model) AS train_models
MATCH (tr:Train) OPTIONAL MATCH (tr)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN tr.id, REDUCE(total = 0, station IN COLLECT(s) | total + station.capacity) AS total_capacity
MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(tr:Train) WITH s, COLLECT(tr.model) AS models RETURN s.name, TAIL(models) AS models_except_first
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.speed >= 150 AND t.speed <= 250 RETURN t.id, t.model, t.speed
MATCH (pa:Passenger) WITH pa ORDER BY rand() LIMIT 3 RETURN pa.name
